case_title: FRED & BLANCA VALLE INC. VS WYNNE, KHALIAH

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WYNNE, KHALIAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FRED & BLANCA VALLE INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WYNNE, KHALIAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FRED & BLANCA VALLE INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,075.25 FILED BY FRED & BLANCA VALLE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WYNNE, KHALIAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF FRED & BLANCA VALLE INC.

IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WYNNE, KHALIAH JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27557 ON 4/29/04 EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,027.61 FILED BY WYNNE, KHALIAH AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FRED & BLANCA VALLE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRED & BLANCA VALLE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WYNNE, KHALIAH $1,475.25 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,497.25, PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT MUTUALLY WAIVE DEFECTIVE SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
